title: Angels
description: 3x8 min climbing threshold — above FTP with low cadence

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/3. 8:00 at 108%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.

coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 8:00 at 108%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 108% × 8:00. Standing, 70-80 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 108% for 8:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
